num: #fields: num - card number, hno - hero number, ctype - card type, count - how many of these cards in deck,
#strength,durability - damage capacity, mana - mana generation per turn

name: Bjorn's First Bow
effect: This is your Main Weapon. Attack range 2.
flavour: Not something he's proud of. Still not bad for a five-year-old.

name: Black Arrows
quest: Spend 1 attack action in the Robber Camp to loot it.
effect:
Starts with 3 arrows here (use [XP] markers).
Spend 1 arrow to add 3 damage to this attack action.
flavour: Painted black for the funeral they are about to attend.

name: Bone Bane Bow
quest: Spend a mend action on Nailfare to bind the relics.
effect:
This is your Main Weapon. Attack range 2.
Count the [RUNE] rolled in each attack action and deal that much damage to another monster adjacent to the target.
flavour: This bunch of bones, bound by braided bamboo became the bane of the banished breathless.

name: Helmet
quest: Kill a brute or a skeleton. Take this helmet instead of the gold [XP].
effect: [DAMAGE]: Prevent 1 damage.
flavour: Radiating forcefulness.

name: Home Sewn Cape
quest: Spend 1 attack action when not adjacent to a monster. Your very own fabrication.
effect:
Add 1 [MANA] here very time you roll a [RUNE].
2[MANA]: Move 1 area.
3[MANA]: Prevent 2 damage.
flavour:
Did Bjorn make this?"
"Sew it seams…

name: Home Sewn Tunic
quest: Practice makes perfect. Spend 1 practice action and 1 experience [XP] to make it.
effect:
[DAMAGE]: Prevent 1 damage.
Spend 1 mend action to remove all damage from this card.
flavour: When your life hangs by a thread, this is sturdier than it seams.

name: Leather Purse
quest: After killing a trollkin, take this bag and spawn 2 brutes next to you. They want the bag back.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Heal 2 damage from yourself or any adjacent hero.
flavour: Keeping your tools handy: thread, needles, bandages, herbs, and a pocket-sized mead sack.

name: Quiver
quest: Kill a rank 3 monster without getting the gold [XP]. Make this quiver instead.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Add 1 damage to this attack action.
flavour: Makes your enemies quiver in their boots.

name: Throwing Axes
quest: Spend 1 practice action in a forest to get your aim right.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Roll 3[DIE_ATTACK] against an adjacent monster.
flavour: I keep missing him…

name: Trollbane
quest: Collect 5 gold [XP] from killing trollkin to get a fearsome reputation.
effect: This is your Main Weapon. Attack range 2. Add 1 damage to attack actions against trollkin.
flavour: Once used to strangle the Trollfather. Not the conventional use of a bow, but hey, it worked.

name: Alva's Bracers
quest: Pay 5 gold [XP] on a road to have them imported from Alfheim.
effect: 3[MANA]: Perform an attack action.
flavour: Brace for impact!

name: Alva's First Bow
effect: This is your Main Weapon. Attack range 2.

name: Belt of Youth
quest: Enter 8 forest areas to gather support from the Elders.
effect: Heal 1 damage from Alva.
flavour: Ironically known as the Waist of Time, it actually carries rejuvenating powers.

name: Bloodline Crystal
quest: Discard 2 cards in Temple Ruins as you realize you're related to Gandalf, king of Alfheim.
effect:
3[MANA]: Add 2 damage to this attack action.
3[MANA]: Draw 1 card.
flavour: I'm … a princess? I knew it!

name: Elven Arrows
quest: Stand in the Troll Caves and spawn an adjacent troll. Oops!
flavour: Elven treasures long forgotten. Used as toothpicks for ages.

name: Elven Blade
quest: Kill 3 adjacent monsters to practice switching weapons.
effect: After each attack action, deal 1 damage to a monster adjacent to Alva.

name: Quiver
quest: Kill a rank 3 monster without getting the gold [XP]. Make this quiver instead.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Add 1 damage to this attack action.
flavour: Makes your enemies quiver in their boots.

name: Singing Bow
quest: When you have rolled 10[DIE_ATTACK] in forests, you have learned the songs of the trees.
effect:
This is your Main Weapon. Attack range 2.
After each attack action, add 1 mana [MANA] to any card.
flavour: Sings your swan song.

name: Throwing Darts
quest: Spend 1 practice action in a forest to get your aim right.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Roll 3[DIE_ATTACK] against an adjacent monster.
flavour: I'm ready to try it blindfolded…

name: Tiara
quest: Find it in the Dark Forest. Turns out you're a princess after all!
effect: Starts with 6 gold [XP] on this card. Gain 1 gold [XP] from here each turn.

name: Windbite
quest: Kill 4 monsters at range 2 or more to get the sponsors lining up.
effect:
This is your Main Weapon. Attack range 2.
Whenever you roll [RUNE], add another [DIE_ATTACK] to your roll for each [RUNE].
flavour: It anticipates your wishes.

name: Blade Decorations
quest: Pay 2 gold [XP] in Grimheim to decorate your sword.
flavour: Now this is what I call a broad sword.

name: Custom Armor
quest: Pay 4 gold [XP] to have it made. Then get anormored with it.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Prevent 2 damage.
flavour: Armor is the blacksmith's strong suit.

name: Flimsy Blade
flavour: This miserable heirloom doesn't look like much, and it's not nearly as good as it looks...

name: Healing Potion
quest: Spend 1 mend action in the Witch Cabin to let it brew.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Heal 1 damage from yourself or any adjacent hero. May be used any number of times per turn.
flavour: This mead is barely legal.

name: Heels
quest: Spend 1 mend action and discard 2 cards in the Witch Cabin. That witch had style!
effect: Deal 1 damage to an adjacent monster.
flavour: High heels can be sooo painful.

name: Helmet
quest: Kill a brute or a skeleton. Take this instead of the gold [XP].
effect: [DAMAGE]: Prevent 1 damage.
flavour: Heading for trouble.

name: Leg Guards
quest: Spend 1 focus action. They're that tight.
flavour: Keeps my legs pretty, and leaves funny marks on their faces.

name: Raven's Claw
quest: Enter 10 forest areas to search for the long-forgotten sword.
effect: This is your Main Weapon. Add 2 damage to each attack action.
flavour: The ancient sword Hrafnakló was forged from an alloy of celestial iron and silver.

name: Tailored Boots
quest: Pay the shoemaker 2 gold [XP] in town. He'll heel your shoes and save their soles.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Move 1 area.
flavour: Fooling your foes with fancy footwork.

name: Throwing Knives
quest: Spend 1 practice action in a forest to get your aim right.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Roll 3 [DIE_ATTACK] against an adjacent monster.
flavour: Now between the fingers...

name: Warrior Shield
quest: Spend 1 attack action, "negotiating" with the traveling merchant.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Prevent 1 damage and draw 1 card.
flavour: A backup disc to save your life.

name: Wildfire Blade
quest: Spend 1 mend action in the Spewing Mountain to forge it.
effect: This is your Main Weapon. After each attack action, deal 1 damage to an adjacent monster.
flavour: Forged in the flames of kidnapped sprites.

name: Battle Boots
quest: Spend 1 focus action to permanently attach them to your feet.
flavour: Stepping on every toe within range.

name: Boldur's First Pick
effect: This is your Main Weapon.
flavour: Picks anything, even noses.

name: Dvalin's Pick
quest: End your movement adjacent to 3 mountain areas. The tomb had better be there!
effect: Spend an attack action to gain 1 gold [XP], 1 mana [MANA], and draw one card.
flavour: Dvalin, who made the Brisingamen jewelry for Freyja, was buried between two mountain walls.

name: Dwarf Helm
quest: Spend 2 gold [XP] in the Temple Ruins. A bowl is a good start.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Prevent 1 damage.
flavour: People hit what they can reach. On Boldur, that's mainly his head.

name: Dwarf Mail
quest: Enter 7 areas adjacent to mountains. Silly family tradition!
effect: Prevent the first damage dealt to Boldur each monster turn.
flavour: Wearing this, Boldur is quite a hot male.

name: Dwarf Pick
quest: Kill 3 monsters, then you get this from an anonymous admirer.
flavour: Boldur, this is for you, so you know I would always pick you! X O X O

name: Eitri's Pick
quest: End your movement adjacent to 4 monsters or 1 legend to pick a fight.
effect: This is your Main Weapon. When you use Rapid Strike, add 2 [DIE_ATTACK] to that attack action.
flavour: Used by Eitiri, who forged Thor's hammer Mjölnir.

name: Mining Equipment
quest: Pay 1 gold [XP] for the equipment. Then pay 2 gold [XP] for insureance and taxes.
effect:
[DAMAGE]: Gain 2 gold [XP] if you stand adjacent to a mountain area.
[DAMAGE]: Gain 3 gold [XP] if you stand adjacent to 3 mountain areas.
flavour: I'm digging this gold rush…

name: Orebiter
quest: Lose 2 gold[XP]. The potential gain is endless.
effect: You may attack adjacent mountain areas. For each damage dealt, gain 1 gold [XP].
flavour: It's an auto-pick.

name: Precision Axes
quest: Spend 1 practice action in a forest to get access to these.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Deal 1 unpreventable damage to an adjacent monster.
flavour: Boldur is not happy until he can fell a tree in one throw.

name: Shield
quest: Enter the Ogre Valley or skip the gold [XP] from killing a troll.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Prevent 2 damage.
flavour: Breaking off one side of a troll breastplate should do the trick

name: Smiterbiter
quest: End your movementin the Marsh of Sorrow, covered to the beard in yuck.
effect: This is your Main Weapon. If you kill a monster in an attack action, any excess damage may be stored here (max 3 stored). Damage stored here may be added to your attack action.
flavour: I axed your first.

name: Cane
quest: Discard 2 cards from hand. Nobody gets the first few spells right.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Move 1 area.
flavour: His cane is comforting – it makes him quite hopful.

name: Drink of the Tides
quest: End your movement next to water to gather the seaweed.
effect: Heal 1 damage from Finkel or an adjacent hero.

name: Element Ring
quest: Spend a mend action adjacent to mountain, plains, and forest.
effect: Add 1 damage to each attack action.
flavour: Forged where the elements meet, this ring rules them all.

name: Lightning Rod
quest: Spend a prepare action and 4 experience [XP] to install it.
effect: Each time you damage a monster, you may spend 1 mana [MANA] from any card to deal 1 additional damage.
flavour: Magic well grounded.

name: Magic Cape
quest: Spend a prepare action in the Wyrm Lair to gather the shed skin.
effect: A fashion accessory to display your cape-abilities. It's got you covered.

name: Power Staff
quest: Deal 3 damage to yourself in the Temple Ruins.
effect: This is your Main Weapon. Attack range 2.
flavour: The hidden dungeon of the old ruin is not safe. At least not with Finkel there…

name: Ring of Au
quest: Remove 7 [MANA] from your cards to make the magical inscriptions.
effect:
[DAMAGE]: Heal 2 damage from yourself or any adjacent hero.
[DAMAGE]: Deal 2 damage to an adjacent monster.
flavour: Ow, ow, ow!

name: Rune Scroll
quest: Spend 2 practice actions to study the runes.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Draw 1 card.

name: Sacred Scroll
quest: Enter the Highlands to stumble upon it.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Draw 1 card.
flavour: Arcane letters, archaic language, but beyond that, new spells to be learned.

name: Wand
quest: Discard 2 cards from hand. Nobody gets the first few spells right.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Add 1 mana [MANA] to 1 of your cards.
flavour: Now extra long, to support wand-ering.

name: Wand of Excessive Power
quest: Discard 3 cards from hand to hotwire it.
effect: This is your Main Weapon. After each attack action, add 1 mana [MANA] to any card.
flavour: It's definitely not free of charge.

name: Wizard's Hat
quest: Spend 4 mana [MANA] to conjure a… groundhog!? I bet you didn't expect that!
effect: When you roll any number of [DIE_ATTACK], roll 1 additional [DIE_ATTACK].
flavour: Hatters gonna hat.

name: Blessed Staff
quest: Spend 1 attack action in Dead Plains to unearth it.
effect: This is your Main Weapon. All [RUNE] count as hits for you.
flavour: Buried with its hopefully still-dead owner, it radiates power.

name: Circle of Life
quest: Equip this for free, if you dare.
effect: Damage dealt to Sindra may be placed on Circle of Life instead. Each time you use a mend action, repair 1 damage from Circle of Life.

name: Cursed Heirloom
quest: Equip this for free, if you dare.
effect: Before your first action each turn, you must take 1 damage. Then draw a card if possible.
flavour: This ancient hand-me-down has claimed the lives of 3 of Sindra's kin.

name: Element Staff
quest: Play 6 cards to get attuned to its powers.
effect: This is your Main Weapon. After each attack action, add 1[MANA] here. You may remove up to 3[MANA] from here to add that much damage to your attack action.
flavour: It's elemental stuff.

name: Healing Potion
quest: Spend 1 mend action in the Witch Cabin to let it brew.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Heal 1 damage from yourself or any adjacent hero. May be used any number of times per turn.
flavour: Life in a botle.

name: Magic Cape
quest: Spend a prepare action in the Wyrm Lair to gather the shed skin.
effect: You always have cover.
flavour: Natural camouflage.

name: Mana Crystal
quest: Enter a plains area in the Spewing Mountain to search the lava flows.
effect: Remove any number of mana [MANA] from here to prevent that much damage against you or another hero within range 2.
flavour: At the slopes of the Spewing Mountain, where ancient rocks hide arcane stones.

name: Sacred Scroll
quest: Enter the Highlands to stumble upon it.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Draw 1 card.
flavour: Arcane letters, archaic language, but beyond that, new spells to be learned.

name: Sindra's Amulet
quest: Enter Nailfare. Place a card from your discard pile under this card.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Perform the effect of the card under this.
flavour: Ritual magic, trapped in a crystal.

name: Trinket
quest: Use 5 mana [MANA] in a single turn to conjure it accidentally.
effect: 3[MANA]: If you have used your 2 actions this turn, perform one of the 4 remaining actions.
flavour: It is the little things in life that inspire.

name: Wand
quest: Discard 2 cards from hand. Nobody gets the first few spells right.
effect: [DAMAGE]: Add 1 mana [MANA] to 1 of your cards.
flavour: Now extra long, to support wand-ering.

name: Wizard's Hat
quest: Spend 4 mana [MANA] to conjure a rabbit. Only then will you be worthy of this hat.
flavour: Hatters gonna hat.
